title: Zadonshchina: Beyond the Don
description: The Russian victory over the Mongol Golden Horde at the Battle of Kulikovo (1380) — written in deliberate imitation of The Tale of Igor's Campaign.
introduction: The Russian victory over the Mongol Golden Horde at the Battle of Kulikovo (1380) — written in deliberate imitation of The Tale of Igor's Campaign.

translation.text: The Russian land rejoiced like a mother whose sons return from a foreign land. Prince Dmitry said: 'Brothers, let us lay down our lives for the Russian land, for the Christian faith.'
